text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: NVLink 是 NVIDIA 的 GPU 间高速互连。

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 为什么需要 NVLink?

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 单 GPU 显存有限 (80GB)，大模型需要多 GPU 并行。
PCIe Gen4 x16: ~32 GB/s (双向) → 太慢!
NVLink: 300-900 GB/s → 比 PCIe 快 10-30×
NVLink 3.0 (A100):
每条 link: 50 GB/s (双向)
每 GPU: 12 条 link → 总带宽 600 GB/s
可以连接到: 其他 GPU (通过 NVSwitch)
典型拓扑 — DGX A100 (8× A100):

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 每个 GPU 通过 NVLink 连接到 NVSwitch
NVSwitch: 一个大的交叉开关 (crossbar)
任意两个 GPU 之间: 600 GB/s 全带宽!

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: GPU 0 GPU 1 GPU 2

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: NVSwitch

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: GPU 5 GPU 4 GPU 3
NVLink 4.0 (H100):
每条 link: 50 GB/s → 总 900 GB/s
NVSwitch 3.0: 支持 256 个 GPU 的全互连 (NVLink Network)
对 CUDA 编程的影响:
cudaMemcpyPeer(): GPU 间拷贝自动走 NVLink
NCCL AllReduce: 利用 NVLink 带宽做梯度聚合
Unified Memory: 跨 GPU 的虚拟地址空间 (透明迁移)
在你的代码中:

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: cudaMemcpyPeer(d_ptr_gpu1, 1, d_ptr_gpu0, 0, bytes);

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: ↑ 如果两 GPU 有 NVLink, 自动走 NVLink (600 GB/s)

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: ↑ 如果没有, 走 PCIe (32 GB/s) → 慢 ~20×
